title: Better Tricky Trials DP
description: Datapack that adds several new trial spawner, new vault and new keys for existing structures
body:
# Better Tricky Trials DP

Free and open-source datapack for Minecraft 1.21 and higher that adds vault and ominous vault to several existing structures.

## Features

This datapack adds the vault to the following structures:

- Bastion Remnant
- End City
- Ancient City (no ominous vault)
- Woodland Mansion (no ominous vault)

It also adds several new items:

- Bastion Key
- Ominous Bastion Key
- City Key
- Ominous City Key
- Echo Key
- Woodland Key
- Dreaming Bottle

Each key corresponds to the vault or ominous vault set in the corresponding structures.

The Dreaming Bottle is an item that allows you to obtain the dreaming effect, which cancels the phantom spawn above the player even if the player hasn't slept for more than an hour (72000 ticks).

This datapack requires the installation of the [Better Tricky Trials](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-tricky-trials-tp) resourcepack and the Better Tricky Trials mod (coming soon).
